# get_boundary_by_area_id { #socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_area_id }

```python
get_boundary_by_area_id(client, area_id)
```

Get boundary by area ID.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|---------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client  | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| area_id | str      | UUID area identifier from ``public.location.area_id``.                                                   | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                           |
|--------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | A single-row DataFrame with boundary geometry, or empty if not found. |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type             | Description                       |
|--------|------------------|-----------------------------------|
|        | SIScorecardError | If *area_id* is not a valid UUID. |
